comment.body:
TOS here. Ya check any AI for specific help with this, since there's a few big things it can be.  Grok, perplexity, chatGPT  all will get specific with your compatibility issues. 

In the meantime, get real REAL familiar with their price zone oscillator study. Incredible for showing momentum strength/tiredness at "do I buy here" moments. Go through different timeframes to get clearer signal. Life saving.

I remember the announcement of the first iPhone.
Steve even showed maps where he searched for starbucks and lots of pins where automatically dropped into the map. 
And then he could dial from one of those pins.

I truly miss when they announced things they where so ground breaking. 

Now it's like, the new color of the iPhone is yellow - and the crowed screams of joy LOL
